$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json widget uninstall missing-pack
exit: 1
stdout:
stderr:
Error: no installed versions of "missing-pack"
Usage:
  switchyard widget uninstall <name> [flags]

Flags:
      --force            uninstall even if dashboards reference the pack's classes
  -h, --help             help for uninstall
      --version string   specific version (default: all installed)

Global Flags:
      --data-dir string    data directory (default "<DEFAULT_DATA_DIR>")
      --endpoint string    API endpoint (unix:///path or tcp://host:port)
      --format string      auto|table|json|yaml (default "auto")
      --log-level string   error|warn|info|debug (default "warn")
      --no-color           disable ANSI color
  -v, --verbose            --log-level=debug shortcut

no installed versions of "missing-pack"
